title: OHP HEALTH-RELATED SOCIAL NEEDS HOUSING SUPPORTS - 211info
text: EUGENE MAIN OFFICE OHP HEALTH-RELATED SOCIAL NEEDS HOUSING SUPPORTS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers case management to help households navigate resources and search for housing. Eligible households are screened and supported through the OHP Health-Related Social Needs benefit. Additional rent and utility assistance may be available based on eligibility and funding availability. 195 W 12th Avenue Eugene, OR 97401 Eligibility: Families with children under age 18 Hours: Monday-Thursday 9am-4:30pm, Friday 9am-noon Email (541) 687-2667 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (541) 687-2667 Main phone Main phone (541) 687-2667 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for appointment. Appointments for phone or video calls only. FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None required at intake LANGUAGES: English, Spanish, interpretation or signing by arrangement AREA SERVED: City of Eugene SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 9am-noon and 1pm-6pm TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: On 5th Avenue between Adams Street and Blair Boulevard. Lane Transit District (LTD) bus stop one block from location. Services: Rent Payment Assistance * Families with Children Transitional Housing/Shelter * Families with Children Other Services Offered At This Location: COUNSELING SETTINGS - MENTAL HEALTH CARE FOOD - MOBILE FOOD PANTY AND BENEFITS ASSISTANCE FOOD - ORGANIC GARDEN PROGRAM INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - HUMAN SERVICES SUBSTANCE USE DISORDER SERVICES - SUBSTANCE USE DISORDER SERVICES If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. EUGENE MAIN OFFICE
